zh.Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾布臣,第一代特威茲穆爾男爵
zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Comyn於1265年出生在蘇格蘭艾爾金爾時，她的父親Sir Alexander Comyn 6th Earl of Buchan, Constable and Justiciar of Scotland48歲，母親Elizabeth de Quincy45歲。她於大約1291年與John De Keith在英國蘇格蘭莫雷結婚。她去世於1296年在英國蘇格蘭享年31歲。

zh-hans.Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Scotland: 英国苏格兰阿爾迪史爾布臣,第一代特威茲穆爾男爵
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Comyn于1265年出生在苏格兰艾爾金爾时，她的父亲Sir Alexander Comyn 6th Earl of Buchan, Constable and Justiciar of Scotland48岁，母亲Elizabeth de Quincy45岁。她于大约1291年与John De Keith在英国苏格兰莫雷结婚。她去世于1296年在英国苏格兰享年31岁。

nameMeanings.name: Comyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Cumming
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin): most probably a habitational name from Bosc-Benard-Commin in Eure, France. This place lies on the edge of the Forêt de Rouvray, near Rouen, in the heart of the district from which came numerous Domesday barons, and so is much more likely to be the source of the name than Comines in Nord. The name is also possibly derived from the personal name Cumin, which is found in Norfolk, Lincolnshire, and Yorkshire in the 12th and 13th centuries and may be of Breton origin, according to Reaney. Compare Old Breton Cunmin, which also appears as Cumin, and is from con- ‘hound’ with an uncertain second element, perhaps the min ‘edge’ which is found in other personal names.

Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Cuimín (or Ó Cuimín) ‘son (or ‘descendant’) of Cuimín’, a personal name formed from a diminutive of cam ‘crooked’. There was a 7th-century abbot of Iona named Cumin. In Scotland, this Irish surname became confused with the Norman name.

History: A notable bearer of the Norman surname is Wilhelmus Comyn, Bishop of Durham, who came north to Scotland with King David I in 1124 and was appointed Chancellor of Scotland. He established his nephew Richard in Tynedale and Roxburghshire, and Richard also rose to be Chancellor of Scotland. The Comyn or Cumming family gained the earldoms of Buchan and Menteith and rose to be the most powerful noble family in Scotland in the century before the rise of King Robert Bruce.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Comyn was born in 1265, in Elginshire, Scotland, her father, Sir Alexander Comyn 6th Earl of Buchan, Constable and Justiciar of Scotland, was 48 and her mother, Elizabeth de Quincy, was 45. She married John De Keith about 1291, in Moray, Scotland, United Kingdom. She died in 1296, in Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 31.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Comyn est née en 1265, à Elginshire, Écosse, son père, Sir Alexander Comyn 6th Earl of Buchan, Constable and Justiciar of Scotland, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de Quincy, avait 45 ans. Elle a épousé John De Keith environ 1291, à Moray, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Elle est décédée en 1296, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 31 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Comyn 1265 in Elginshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Alexander Comyn 6th Earl of Buchan, Constable and Justiciar of Scotland 48 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth de Quincy 45. Sie hat um 1291 in Moray, Schottland, United Kingdom John De Keith geheiratet. Sie starb 1296 im Alter von 31 Jahren in Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Comyn è nata il nel 1265 nel Elginshire, Scotland, sua padre, Sir Alexander Comyn 6th Earl of Buchan, Constable and Justiciar of Scotland, aveva 48 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth de Quincy, aveva 45 anni. Lei sposato John De Keith circa 1291, nel Moray, Scozia, Regno Unito. Morì nel 1296, nel Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 31 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Comyn(이)가 1265년 스컷랜드 엘긴실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Alexander Comyn 6th Earl of Buchan, Constable and Justiciar of Scotland(은)는 48세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth de Quincy(은)는 45세였다. 그녀는 대략 1291년 영국 스코틀랜드 모라이에서 John De Keith(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1296년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 31세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Comyn nasceu em 1265, em Elginshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Alexander Comyn 6th Earl of Buchan, Constable and Justiciar of Scotland, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth de Quincy, tinha 45 anos. Ela casou-se com John De Keith aproximadamente 1291, em Moray, Escócia, United Kingdom. Ela faleceu em 1296, em Escócia, United Kingdom, com 31 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Comyn родилась в 1265 г. в местности элгиншир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Sir Alexander Comyn 6th Earl of Buchan, Constable and Justiciar of Scotland было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Quincy, 45. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John De Keith около 1291 г. в местности мореи, Шотландия, Великобритания. Она умерла в 1296 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 31 год.

Se casó con John De Keith aproximadamente 1291, en Moray, Escocia, Reino Unido. Murió en 1296, en Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 31 años.
